note: Country-level mean interpersonal trust (ppltrst, 0-10 scale, normalized to [0,1]). Only AT microdata is in the local parquet. Cluster simulations use trust_people_band to approximate each cluster's trust profile using the available AT sample.

nordic.description: Nordic welfare states — high social capital, institutional trust

southern.description: Southern European — Mediterranean, lower trust baseline

eastern.description: Eastern European post-communist — lower interpersonal trust
